allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Count: {len\(d\)}''\); [print\(f''  {a[""id""][:20]}... cat={a[""category""]} cities={a[""cities""][:2]} ts={a[""timestamp""]}''\) for a in d[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t[''path'']\) for t in d.get\(''tree'',[]\) if t[''path''].endswith\(''.js''\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f[''name'']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t[''path'']\) for t in d.get\(''tree'',[]\) if ''.py'' in t[''path'']]")
